Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. \M-04-169
Dear Mr. Wachob:
This letter addresses your request for written advice on the clarification of an
advisory letter issued to Mayor Cheryl Maki on the provisions of the political Reform
Act.r After a careful review of the falts you have rrib*itt"d, we decline to provide
written advice at this time. Your questions involve analysis of facts which have already
occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct, a
circumstance prohibited by regulation 1g329(bXsXA) and (c)(a)(A), copy enclosed.
Should you have any additional questions on this rnatter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca

sections.conclusion: After a careful review of the facts you have submitted, we decline to provide written advice at this time. Your questions involve analysis of facts which have already occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct, a circumstance prohibited by regulation 18329(b)(5)(A) and (c)(1)(A).

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The City Attorney requested written advice clarifying a prior advisory letter issued to Mayor Cheryl Maki regarding provisions of the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: After a careful review of the facts you have submitted, we decline to provide written advice at this time. Your questions involve analysis of facts which have already occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct, a circumstance prohibited by regulation 18329(b)(5)(A) and (c)(1)(A).

Your questions involve analysis of facts which have already occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct, a circumstance prohibited by regulation 1g329(bXsXA) and (c)(a)(A), copy enclosed. Should you have any additional questions on this rnatter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca Counsel Wallace General Counsel Enclosure JWwjg I Govemment Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the Califomia Code of Regulations. J Assi
embedding.summary: The FPPC declined a request from the City of Auburn's City Attorney for written advice clarifying a prior advisory letter to Mayor Cheryl Maki regarding the Political Reform Act, citing prohibition against issuing advice on past conduct.
